description: Remediate the resume at /home/ga/Documents/resume_draft.docx to be ATS-friendly. Move the contact information (Name, Email, Phone, LinkedIn) from the Page Header into the top of the main document body, leaving the Header empty. For the four dated entries (Job titles and Degree), align the dates to the right margin at 6.0 inches using a single Tab character and a Right Tab Stop instead of spaces. Apply the 'Heading 1' paragraph style to the 'EXPERIENCE', 'EDUCATION', and 'SKILLS' section titles. Save the result as /home/ga/Documents/resume_final.docx.
